display.name: Flexi, martin + geiss - dedicated to the sherwin maxawow
display.author: Flexi, martin + geiss

annotation.technical_notes: A minimalist solid-color canvas driven entirely by audio-gated state changes. The background color instantly switches on detected beats from the music, bypassing spatial feedback loops or sampler_main processing. The absence of decay trails or warp fields results in a stark, high-contrast strobe effect.

compatibility.note: capture was empty (24766 bytes); preset doesn't render meaningfully against the current test signal
